---
title: "Translations"
subtitle: "数学文献翻译"
listing:
  contents: translations
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
  grid-columns: 2
  page-size: 10
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" icon=false}
这里收集了一些优秀的综述性数学文献的中文翻译版本。
:::
